review_text:
I cam for the jumping pillow that was still advertised so was the water slide.
Both have been removed

Nice and beautiful outside area. But this doesn’t make up for the bad amenities. They haven’t see cleaning for weeks. Everything is dirty, calcified, grubby, especially the shower. The management should really have a look at that. I cannot understand the good reviews. The amenities were one of the worst along the coast and not the quality we expected from NRMA.
Peaceful park, spacious sites. Torfinn the ground-man’s was very welcoming and friendly. Clean amenities. Town a 5 minute drive from park.

Had a camper van so can't comment on rooms
Very clean site, lovely staff highly recommend
Beautiful caravan park, lovely people, spacious campsite’s, amenities very clean. My kids loved this place. Will visit again.
Nice place, not as close as we thought to Yeppoon town but not a deal breaker, very clean park and would stay again.

Excellent site, very well-maintained with roomy, level grass site with private en-suite toilet and shower (which was very new and excellent quality). Excellent amenities for 6 berth motor home, would highly recommend!

It’s just an average park.

Lost some of its wow factor, ammenities are clean, pools are clean.
Just a standard park that won’t wow you.
Lady at reception definitely wasn’t welcoming. But again that can happen from anyone.
It’s a little from all the shops but that’s ok.

Sites are big, an issue we had with our grass site was though it was full of prickles. Shoes were a necessity, and we ended up rolling out at mat. Not a big deal but sometimes it’s nice to feel grass on your feet.

Probably would try another park next time I’m in Yeppoon

What a beautiful campground! Sites separated by beautiful trees and shrubs. All services on the pitches. Immaculate facilities. 15 mins by bus (and walk) to the harbour for ferries to Great Keppel Island. Great!

Good location. Pools quite small but there are 2 to choose from.
Good facilities and grounds. Nice quiet location.
The room has been previously damaged. Looks fairly fresh though and being school holidays repairs may be difficult.  Great staff and the grounds are great for the kids to run around.
Worth putting this park on your list if your visiting Yeppoon. Great Park

Sorry, in my opinion the sites charges are too expensive at this park for what it is. Just FYI for others, the photos on google of water slides are inaccurate since water slides have been removed long ago. Also warning for parents with kids, the Mulambin beach is a fairly long walk and not nice for swimming (similar to all of Yeppoon beaches). I recommend a trip to great Kepple island for swimming. For nice beaches for kids in close proximity of the carivan park I recommend Agnes water a few hours south.

Lack of communication this year compared to last year, in regards to food trucks, park events ie movies or even musicians playing in park. Last year we were notified daily by sms of events happening within the park. There was no information on local events in regards to New Years Eve celebrations. Amenities block although clean, a lot of the buttons in both Men and Ladies toilets broken. I understand it's peak season, but the bins were over flowing. In comparison to last year, the minor details were attended too which made the stay more welcoming. For example we've just moved on to another park, and with in the first half hour of arriving we were given children's activities, complimentary air freshers for the car or van, wrist bands for the kids, and the managers drove around handing out Zooper Doopers as we were setting up. The little things.... We really enjoyed our stay at the park last year, but after this year, we might be looking elsewhere for future bookings.
Best Staff and Best Park
Fantastic Park

Really great park. Nice cabin, was clean and well maintained.
Pools are Nice...some shaded areas and some with no cover so a good mix.
Playground and jumping pillow occupied a bunch or our time with out girl.

All in all....good week away for our family.
We
The campsite is beautiful, and the unpowered sites are quiet. The bathrooms are clean.
Un bon camping moderne situé proche de la plage, que l'on peut rejoindre à pied
Very clean and tidy park.  Large sites. Amenities clean.
Comfortable. Bad Wifi connection.

We stayed in Yeppoon for 2 nights to explore the area's cycleways.  We chose this park, because it's right beside a well-maintained cycle track.  Check-in was friendly and efficient.  The park was quiet, clean and well cared for, and the campsites are a good size (not packed together like sardines).  Our Ensuite site (116) was large, flat and well grassed.  With the van backed onto the site, the hot afternoon sun was directly on the awning side.  We would choose site 117 next time, so the awning is shaded in the afternoon. The 12 ensuite sites in this park are arranged around 3 buildings, with 4 individual bathrooms in each building.  The entry to your private ensuite, is shared with the site next door, via one set of steps.  At night a motion-sensor floodlight lights up both campsites, when either of the ensuites are used.  The ensuites are compact, modern and clean, with a good-sized shower and plenty of hot water.  This area of the park is newly developed, so there are no trees or shrubs yet.  We did not use the facilities, but we saw two pools, a jumping pillow, playground, outdoor movie area and camp kitchen.  E-Bike and trike hire are also available.  We would visit again.  Thank you for a pleasant stay.
Amazing loved it really quiet palm trees everywhere everything is clean.
Stayed on a caravan site which was lovely.

Staff super friendly but the kids bunk beds are straight outta prison. I had to sleep in the collapsed plastic covered mattress as my kids refused to. You get what ammenities you pay for in a standard cabin but the beds are absolutely horrible.
The staff are absolutely fantastic, so helpful with everything, it’s lovely to walk into a reception to check in and be greeted with a friendly face
We stayed on an ensuite grassed sites. We had a wonderful time.
Near to the beach doesn't have the slide into the pool that is pictured anymore as it's been removed

Unfriendly service. We did not receive a warm welcome at reception.||Camp kitchen was neglected and very unclean.||Dirty. Weeds growing through wall.||Location is great if you are going to Keppel Island.

We booked three nights in a two bedroom cabin and were very happy we did. Quiet, safe and the cabin had everything we could need. Clean, comfortable and with an outdoor setting on a verandah. We would definitely stay there again.
Good park close to beaches and the marina. Good size sites.

I asked for two beds instead of one bed and bunkbeds and I was given an upgrade for a fee just to find the upgrade was one bed and longer bunks apparently. They didn’t clarify my upgrade was just a different type of bunk bed. Feet still hung over the end and got a bad night sleep. They charged me extra for the upgrade and didn’t refund when asked. Disappointing to hear the staff say I miss understood them blabla…
The shower door was also jammed and very hard to open. My child got stuck. The TV in the bedroom didn’t work and had to be auto tuned.
And the waterslide still advertised on Google maps is not there warning. The air conditioner was old and dirty. facility is also at least 25 minutes drive from any supermarket.
Don’t recommend staying here.

This is easily the best camping ground that we have ever stayed at. We booked a powered caravan site with ensuite for 2 nights, but decided to stay for 3. The kids loved the jumping pillow in the playground, as well as the swimming pools and the games room (free arcade games from the 80s, table soccer, table tennis, book exchange). The campground was clean, well maintained, and quiet at night. We would definitely stay here again. Highly recommended.

Toilet block “male toilet” doors do not close accurately and most are impossible to lock.
Require simple maintenance! Get your act together!
Great surroundings
Tried to “con” extra night by stating “limited availability” annoying and unnecessary. Camp is half empty in fact! Cancelled extra night as unnecessary and an impost. Expect refund.
Good location, nice rooms as described and clean
Friendly staff and well maintained, clean facilities

Stayed 2 nights lovely park but no shops nearby, beach about 900 mtrs down the road. Does not do NRMA specials as per there SAVEINAUGUST emails. Just received members discount, no acknowledgment for my membership was required.

What a beautiful Park. We only got to enjoy it briefly while passing through but we will return for a longer stay. Great price, fantastic amenities, beautifully kept grounds, pleasant reception staff and good internet. Large caravan site was easy to get into and set up, and off the street parking next to our van. Couldn't ask for more! BIG 5 STARS 🌟 🌟🌟🌟🌟
The  amenities and camp kitchens were clean. We were on a powered site and near to the beach.

If you pay unpowered site, they send you to back paddock with out water taps and no toilets. Kind of waste of money. Should have free camped.

But hey, if you are one of those persons that likes to camp reaaally close to others etc. This might be the place for you🙃

Fantastic Park, great Amenities clean, lots of activities to do here.
Love how organised the Park is.
Emu Park 15 min away.
Highly Recommend Park.
Great place to stay, amenities were spotless, so a big tick from me, lovely friendly staff and vamp dwellers 😊
Sites are snug, location is amazing but reception staff seem to consider you an inconvenience
Think i found paradise

We stayed for 2 nights in the  large cabin (felt like a apartment). 2 bedroom, large kitchen, lounge and dining. Comfortable bed and fresh linen.  Tea and coffee, biscuits, milk all provided. Kitchen has everything you need if you feel like cooking. Good size bathroom with toiletries provided. Large balcony out the front. Very spacious and clean and tidy. Great for a boat as you can have it next to you or in front. Hose there as well for wash down. Park was quiet and no traffic noise. 3 mins from the boat ramp. Pool looked good, kids playing on the jumping pillow, movies near the pool in the evening. Ramp for those who find stairs hard.I would certainly stay here again.

Although a little out of the main part of town, this is a fantastic caravan park.  No road traffic, just the sound of heaps of kids having a ball.   Our caravan site had a little garden to the side with palm trees as a divider between our site and next door.  Easy access to the toilet/laundry facilities.  Lots of fun stuff for kids (if you have them).|Bike track all the way into town.|Beach not too far across the road.  Public transport also available close by (only $0.50c cash only per person......)
Lovely clean quiet park..11kms out of Yeppoon..Staff at reception ok.. not overly friendly.. lots of driving in and out of town which was annoying.
Have stayed here before and just enjoyed another couple of days. Plenty of things to do and kids friendly
Great caravan park, close to boat ramp

Overall the park is well set out and  the amenities clean. We were 2  families with swags and a camper van.  We were right out the front of the amenities block  (sites 29 and 30) which was quite noisy with people coming and going through the night,and the lights were on all night ( which was understandable )and you could hear the toilet system going all night.  Note; unless you’re in a caravan  avoid this area if possible .

Someone very close to me stayed here not to long ago she complained about the cleanliness of the room being horrid, the floor was sandy and the fridge hadn’t been wiped, the garden was overgrown and her kids went to jump on the giant pillow but there was no shade. She will not be staying here again!!!
Very modern powered en-suite sites with great shower facilities. All round great park in a beautiful part of Australia. One of our favorite places.
2 bedroom deluxe villa. Lots of room. A few maintenance issues and dusty aircons but comfortable none the less. Great amenities for the kids
Beautiful, spacious sites, friendly staff
tolles resort, gutes preis leistungs verhältnis

Many great sites but they put us on 33. Very narrow for standard size van with wider messy and overgrown garden to one side. That was a bad trip hazard when trying to access outlets on that side. Not happy about that but thought only site available! Wrong, many other suitable sites near us left vacant during our whole stay. And not all toilets were working in ladies. Disappointed so might try another park next time.

Muy buena ubicación, cercana a la playa. Instalaciones en perfecto estado. Todo perfectamente limpio y bien mantenido. Estuvimos en una parcela sin electricidad muy amplia, bien nivelada y césped en perfecto estado. Lugar muy recomendable.
Just had two nights in a cabin, everything great, close enough to drive into yepoon for dinner, and shopping. Cabin equipped with everything you need, quiet setting, great staff.
Wifi is a joke
Wish we'd stayed longer...
Very nice camp grounds ,heaps to do in yeppoon & surrounds,we went kayaking today off emu Park & saw turtles & jumping 🐟🐟🐟👍great beach nearby ,beautiful @ sunrise,lovely to hear the ocean again 🌊🌊🌊
Great place to stay ..very clean great amenities
We stayed at a powered en-suite site, was wonderful! Highly recommend,

We stayed in a powered grass site which was out the back and very spacious. Glad we were here and the sites closer to centre of the park seemed very tight.
Amenities were good and they catered well for the kids with bike hire, playground, pool, jumping pillow and nightly movies.
It was VERY windy during our stay which was unfortunate but still enjoyed our visit.

One recommendation would be to extend the concrete path we had at the rear of the park to the entire park, better for kids riding bikes and scooters.
Location is good. Friendly staff. Washrooms are not cleaned well.
Great, friendly staff

The grounds surrounding the cabins and vans were lovely, but the recreational area, pool, and other facilities appeared shabby and run-down. It didn't match the impressive video I saw on YouTube by GetAway in 2020 or photos on expedia and other similar sites. The lack of a water slide, no cover over the jumping pillow or play area, worn-out peddle carts, and unkept grounds in that particular area were disappointing. My son and his family, who had visited in 2023, also felt that the park's presentation had deteriorated. Despite the website's promise of "seasonal activities" for kids, we found no organized activities during our four-day stay over the school holiday period, except for movies offered which is also added as a key feature and again, this area was run down and didn't match the photos on the internet.

We stayed in a spacious two-bedroom cabin fully equipped with two air conditioning units, which was a plus. However, the outdated sherpa blankets on the bunks, the stained sofa and the mold inside the aircon units were a letdown. The queen bed was comfortable, but the rooms had a damp smell when closed up.

Overall, our stay was just okay. If I ever find myself in Yeppoon again, I will choose a different accommodation option next time.

1st stay in a while here and looks to have gone down hill unfortunately, overgrown grass and gardens, dead palm leaves either hanging down or laying over sites and paths, pool water debatable (2 children with ear infections and 1 with a chest). Last stay there was atmosphere with  activities, food trucks, live music, games and all sorts in the pool areas but nothing this time, even the shade sail is MIA over the jumping pillow, lets hope the new manager and NRMA sorts these issues out as the old manager clearly clocked out months ago letting the standards slip away
Great park 2pools kids park good toilets and showers.

INCREDIBLE is an understatement! These guys know how to run a holiday park! Jo at the desk and Chris the manager were so kind and wonderful during our stay here and we are forever grateful. Thank you for having us and we hope to visit again one day
Amazing park for kids, nice pools, excellent jumping balloon, large accomodation, close to nice beaches and restaurants, cannot wait to return!

Beautiful spot, great for families we stayed in a cabin and it was lovely, swimming pool is a decent size and mostly shaded which is a bonus, the kids play area was nice and big our child loved the jumping pillow (however it could do with a couple of swings)

Friendly team, very accommodating we had an amazing experience here and it’s not too far to travel to tourist attractions.

Clean amenities and has a laundry site where you can either hang your clothes out or use the dryers, not too expensive either.

Great little park, we had an en suite bathroom that was spotless, and worth the extra money.
We didn't use any of the facilities but the pool looked great. Extremely quiet when we stayed, a good drive out from the town.
The only down side was the miserable old lady on reception. When checking in and out she was rude, not engaging and extremely grumpy, the other 2 younger ladies that were behind her when we checked in and beside her when we checked out were lovely, smiley and friendly.
Lovely park with lovely staff, every single staff member all over the park was friendly and smiling. Very clean with modern amenities. Good location not too far from the town. Thank you!
Great place! Good facilities!Lots of things to do for the kids. Jumping pillow, pool with slides, Food vans at night. Movies. Very good.
Overpriced for what you get.

We stayed for 2 nights at a powered site. The powered sites are located next to a public road and there’s no fence in between. The park also wasn’t gated at all so anyone could have easily walked into our space.

The kitchens were outdoors and attracted heaps of flies. There was also no fan which made things worse.

Bathrooms were very clean and modern

The staff were very friendly
This is a fantastic location in Mulambin Beach ⛱️ Caravan Park 2-28 Bluff Cres fantastic accommodation options provide 😀 plenty of room for the family to relax and enjoy their holiday 😀

It was great pools were really dirty and some staff were yelling over hen that good the toilets are far from the pools and the rec room wasn't open and never will like the slides the family room was closed and a bit of false advertising

Beautiful park. wonderful service. Karts in great condition.
Everything did close a little early (pool, rec room)
Room was clean, a couple of bigger units would be great, (2 bath and small laundry) definitely will stay again.
Great location, great service and good value for money.
Lovely park, lots of space, clean, We were there for Halloween and enjoyed all the festivities.
Stayed in our van. Great spot to use as a base. Close to Emu Park.

Awesome experience!!
They stayed back after hours to help us out on a saturday night as we got screwed somewhere else.
Awesome lawned flat sites, great amenities and facilities.
Would highly recommend to anyone and all!
One of the best caravan parks we have ever been to. The entertainment was tops, the staff were great.

We had a really nice stay in this holiday park. We had a Ensuite powered site for our czmpervan, just at the end of the holiday park with a lot of space. Everything was very clean and tidy. Staff gave us a warm welcome and was really helpful. We are coming back.

Well located camp ground with good/clean amenities and friendly staff. I wasn't thrilled that anyone could access the ground without any problems (no fence, access control etc). Our site was next to the backstreet and felt a bit odd -not much privacy and people could literally walk into our site from the road.

A lovely, clean park, 10 minutes from the hustle and bustle of Yeppoon. We stayed in the middle of Sept school holidays so the park was very busy. However, facilities were maintained to a consistently high standard and staff couldn’t do enough to help. |This park is geared towards families, with so many activities available. The live music and sausage sizzle on Sat afternoon were an added bonus. The sites are compact and there is limited shade available. |Overall, this was a wonderful holiday experience.
Very friendly, family orientated park. Clean, new ensuite made our tent camping that bit more comfortable. Will be back!

Great for families caravaning and tenting.
Staff very friendly and supportive.

Spacious blocks, playground, jumping castle pool live music and other school holiday activities.

2nd time visiting from Brisbane.
Very enjoyable stay.
Very expensive for a grass site that sloped down a hill with no actual grass but the pool was nice. Very average experience.

We stayed somewhere near room 206 for 3 days. The rooms where very luxurious, except a few insignificant spots. The activities were quite fun and the location is great as well. Wish that they bring back the waterslide and improve the games room.

Thanks Sandra and team for fitting us in new site. We loved our stay and chat with you guys.
Plenty of space here great amenaties pools are a bit cool.
Very close to marina and local shop down road pizza's etc.
NO lighting at night but pretty secure park lots of in out traffic via back open entry.

Beautifully kept caravan park, facilities clean and nice pool, our site was a good size but I felt uneasy having no fences around, I was assured by reception it was a low crime rate area  but would had liked a site with more security.
It’s a few kilometres out of Yeppoon and not close to anything but the beach in walking distance is lovely.

Google wanted me to review here, I haven't been here yet, google is weird.
But heres 5 stars.

Friendly staff but bad location. At first it seemed like we might stay another day but that changed when the sun set. Mosquitos, Ants, Flys, Ticks..i mean everything came crawling and flying towards us. There was a little creek with frogs behind the fence - i think thats why. We even had to go to the hospital to get a tick removed. Left that place asap the next morning and wont ever come back. Also the "beach" is not worth it.

We felt that this was the best campsite we stayed in, in the dozens we stayed in, in our recent trip to Australia. The place is extremely well run, extremely tidy and clean. The staff were excellent, helping us get the tv working so we could watch the olympics. We would definitely love to visit again and will be recommending this place to others. There is a lovely walk to the turtle view look out which is closeby, and the ferry to the keppel island is just down the road.

This park is very well maintained and facilities are kept clean given the number of people constantly using them.
Nice clean sites and activities provided in the evenings inclusive of food trucks and movies in the outdoor cinema (mainly kids movies though).
The park is in a great location!

We had a powered caravan site for two nights. Great facilities. Very clean. I especially liked the piped music into the ablutions block and the rubber mats that you could put down in the showers. Walking distance to the beach. They were building ensuite sites when we were there, which we will request on our next visit.

Parfait, grande taille.
Très propre

Beautiful spot
Great amenities
Weekend food trucks and activities.

Yeppoon is a very enjoyable site in a wonderful location with great toilet facilities and lots of fun activities and things to enjoy! Highly recommend. Especially enjoyed taking one of the electric bikes on a tour around the bay— there are great cycling and running lanes.
Emplacement en fin de camping, face au chantier d'extension.

We were amazed with the entertainment provided by the park for the children and food vans onsite. However disappointed at the fact the unpowered sites are quite exposed without any privacy or secure fencing to protect valuables. I would suggest this be considered as opposed to other infrastructure investments.

A truely amazing pristine park ,something for everyone , outdoor movies for kids pancakes for guests,  poets talking ,just a stroll to the beach ⛱ lots more , a park u must try u wont regret staff amazing 😀 😉
Toilet is very nice, toilet entry doesn't need a key or a passcode. A bit far from cafes and restaurants though.

The park is under new management, which does not mean better. Business is too good and they don't care about long standing NRMA members. We have stayed at this park before and were treated with respect. Unfortunately, not this time. We booked for a week. However, a day after we arrived we were told that the dump point was not available due to construction. We have a large motor home and no motor car and this was unacceptable. Told that the dump point would be available that afternoon. That did not happen. My spouse called office and they said that the dump point would only be available in another few days but we could use the dump point 2+ km away. We expressed our disappointment as we had no transport and asked if they could provide this, which they said they would not do and we could leave if we were not happy. They refunded the balance of our money but we struggled to find alternative accommodation during the busy holiday period. Ruined our holiday.
P.S. I read the response from the manager. Firstly, your groundsman said he would speak to the office about transportation to the nearby dumpsite. He did not offer to take our waste cassete to the dumpsite!  This is a lie. When my wife asked you if there was someone to take us there you said "No". When I spoke to you the next day you said that if my wife had been nicer to you on the phone you might have offered.  You are in the service business and you should be more interested in your client's issues rather than your own feelings.  Secondly, you did not reimburse us in full you reimbursed us for the days that we did not stay at the park because we had no means to legally empty our waste cassete.
Family focused park. Entertainment provided.  Clean and good sites.

The rooms aren't  huge but great for 3 kids and two adults. The staff seemed friendly, including maintenance and the place is well kept. Free movies also a plus. Beach is lovely and just across the road.
AMAZING... Great Staff, very clean rooms, very well maintained park and gardens 👍 👌 very impressed 5 STARS 🌟 🌟🌟🌟🌟

We loved our stay at this park. It has beautiful, well kept gardens, great kids facilities, food vans from time to time, clean and big amenities and the outdoor cinema with the movie night was the cherry on top! It was also very quiet which we like. Definitely recommend this park if travelling to Yeppoon.

This place is amazing to stay at, with or without kids! We stayed in a 2 bedroom cabin, and it was just the cutest thing. The staff are so friendly and helpful as well as people seem to respect the other people and the noise levels at required times. This was our first time staying here, and we can't wait to come back later this year.

(The only fault I would say is the "games room", it looks like a jail rec area)

Such a lovely spot, friendly helpful staff, the park and amenities are kept beautiful and clean all the time, close to everything you would like to see, you can hope a boat at the marina and head over to Keppel island, we will back to staff at this little gem
Stayed on an unpowered site, can't say enough nice things about the place, Yeppoon was very windy everywhere

Fantastic family park, lots to do for the kids, jumping pilliow, playground, 2 pools, pedal carts & outdoor movie theatre. The cleaniest toilets & showers we have ever seen while camping. Close to attractions, Keppel Island etc.

Vi overnattede jer i vores camper. Havde bestilt et par dage, men vi kørte meget tidligt morgenen efter.
Pool er overhovedet ikke som på billedet.
Meget meget lille.
Service var squ op af bakke
Excellent place to spend your stays.  Quiet and spacious.  Pool, bathrooms, kitchen, refrigerator, wi-fi. Very friendly staff.  The price is excellent, I will return!

Der er desværre en meget lille pool og langt til handle muligheder.
Men ellers flotte omgivelser
The attention of the reception team, the place available to leave the car and the store and the cleanliness were impeccable. We will be back soon! 😃

Stay two day..Room is clean, Feng shui is good,  ..only not cutting board, no floor towels or floor mats cause in the bathroom very slightly after wet , no biscuits maybe forgot and no hands towels too. The rest all good.

One of the best caravan parks I’ve been to and have been to plenty! The whole area is kept pristine and the ladies at reception were the friendliest and kindest. The palm trees, lovely gardens and the hills in the background make it feel like a holiday.

Lovely clean and picturesque park
Good ammenities. Great activities for children and friendly staff.
We camped here and had a great time. Close to the beach.  Plenty of activities for the kids. Take plenty of mosquito repellent, you will need it.
Great spot, great all round park and well looked after. Great staff!!!

We spent one night in Yeppoon and we found casually this camp. We had no expectations and it was a beautiful discovery 😍  The madams at the reception were very kind and welcoming and the shared areas were tidy and clean. Nice service 👌

Great place to stay with children. The 3 bedroom cottage held all our 4 adults and 4 children very comfortably. Had all kitchen facilities including oven, stove, microwave, etc. Only 2 minutes drive to Turtle Lookout which is a lovely walk and we actually got to see some turtles. Only a short drive into town. Movie night on the lawn was awesome.

Stayed here for a night, was definitely one of the cheaper options compared to those further up on the main beach!
Good price for unpowered site, lots of space when we were there so it was pretty quiet, although plenty of caravans and vans in the powered sites, essentially full.

Facilities plentiful in the bathrooms, and nice camp kitchen area as well. They have the pools, games room that you need a deposit for, bouncing pillow and playground. It isn't much of a walk to one of the beaches, off the road a bit so minimal car traffic
Only stayed for one night, but it was very nice!
Amazing amenities, good location and super nice staff. Thank you for having us!

Hi we spent 10 nights here last week, they gave us a lovely corner camp 🏕 site ,easy to reverse the caravan 🚐 in, no big tree's plenty of palm to separate the sites , the park is very clean plenty of hot water for showers no metres, the staff are very friendly and helpful very quiet at night, all ages were there no bang bang music, it wasn't the school holidays, we try not to go in school holidays 😀 👍 we have 4 grandchildren so we know what it's like 😀 lovely stay well organised family holiday, will be back well rested 🤩🤣😇

I want to start with, if you have left a negative review about this place, then you clearly are a self entitled Karen.

My family LOVED our trip of 5 days here.
Clean as, facilities are on point, pool always clean, never any rubbish around, no bad smells or odours anywhere.
Beds are soooo comfortable, admin are one of a kind, super generous, kind, warm hearted people.
The entire site itself is super safe, minutes from amazing beaches and a tavern.
Tonnes of activities for the kiddos and a decent selection of food and drinks at the kiosk.
My cars bearings died travelling here and required us to stay extra nights, admin were super supportive of this and accommodated our needs without  any worries or hesitation.
We will be back, we have recommended to our extended family.
Thankyou from my family to your team, we will see you next time.
Chris, Jacinta, Charlie and Mason. X
Great place to stay. Top park and service
Spacious spots and clean amenities but no shade or protection anywhere from the strong coastal winds. Boom gate at the front entrance but the exit lacks any security, anyone could drive in/out.

I tried to like this place...but found it hard. Nothing really wrong with it. Amenities are clean and and in good condition.  Sites have nice green grass and a slab. Some...but not alot have shade. Non powered sites are average....in the 'paddock' out the back...no shade. Sites are a decent size. The location was a minus for us. And it just didn't have an atmosphere about it.
Great well designed park and great staff.Stayed two weeks only problem is its eight kilometres from Yeppoon.
Lovely caravan park.  Staff were wonderful,  sites were ample and well defined,  quite cheap and located right near the causeway and about 10 minutes from the CBD

Travelling up the coast and booked here for 3 nights. Was shocked to see that there is no gates for access to the park and no access codes for amenities.. this means that anyone (whether paying to stay or randoms off the street) can access everything!! They can even park right out the front of your van/site leaving you no room to park (as we saw plenty of times).

I feel like this is something that should be fixed to make those of us paying feel safe and access what we are paying for.
Well maintained and laid out park. Additional activities ( movie night, poetry reading)

Called up to get a site, reception lady wasn’t that helpful decided against staying here. Might be good for families that are desperate to find somewhere but definitely the worst nrma receptionist so far.
Fantastic place, loads for kids to do, clean and tidy, definitely a favourite place to stay :)
Beautiful park Only a bit far out of town Lovely staff

Very enjoyable stay Lots to do within the park activities for children and grey nomads alike. Close enough to enjoy Yeppoon and surrounding suburbs but far enough away to enjoy the peace and tranquillity.
Great spot. Good facilities. Away from the hustle and Bustle.

The service and reception was great and booking easy. We were going to be late arriving after a flat tyre. So rang and explained our situation. They were very accommodating, and sent an email with late arrival details. Which made it less stressful. Yeppoon & Rosslyn looks like a popular tourist and caravan place. As it is a very beautiful location. So hard to find a caravan site at any park in Yeppoon, and we were trying to visit family. This NRMA Caravan park had a cancellation and kindly rang us back to offer a site. The facilities from what we could see looked good. Recommend.

Gold Standard!! travelling for 3 months Qld NT  WA you are the Best
Thank you NRMA.

Stayed for a night in a powered site. Good clean facilities friendly staff. Lots of activities available within the park , live music, painting ,pancakes in the morning. Looks like a top park to take the kids. We went for a bike ride into Roslyn marina mostly flat all the way. Would stay again highly recommend.

Great park about 8 km from central Yeppoon. Beaut facility with clean and large bathroom facilities and pools. Many organised activities and entertainment provided by the park. Would certainly recommend a stop here if you’re visiting the Yeppoon area.
Lovely Caravan Park great facilities. Kris at reception was fantastic and super friendly. Will be back
We are caravaners the sites are a good size toilet and showers modern and very clean. Great location for kids just a 400 metre walk or drive to the beach,prices are reasonable.
Great park. Staff quick to respond to unruly children on play equipment. Clean amenities.
Lovely place. Nicely appointed.
A great place to stay good service under new management
Good sites . Friendly staff.
Lovely friendly and efficient staff, well maintained facilities and clean amenities.

Love this place! Camped first night then studio cabin second night due to weather. Excellent facilities, service, ambiance. Stainless steel cookware instead of terrible Teflon! Thanks for a great stay!!
Great spot for caravans to pull  up  and stay a while. Quiet  park out back and good amenities. 👍
Fantastic very well kept Park
Good grassed powered site. A little out of town but quiet and excellent amenities.
This is the best place… Reception girls are very friendly. Rates are amazingly cheap. Nice bathrooms.
